raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":1.0,"RX.1":0.0,"RX.2":0.3,"RX.3":0.0,"RX.4":0.0,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.7":"The delegation directly requests checking the citations, which aligns with verifying reference accuracy, literature coverage, and proper attribution as the load-bearing task.","RX.1":"The delegation does not involve identifying or disclosing uncertainties in the artifact.","RX.2":"Checking citations can peripherally support avoiding overclaims by ensuring claims are properly supported and attributed.","RX.3":"The delegation does not request ensuring adherence to the scope of the research or artifact.","RX.4":"The delegation on citations in a numerical framework paper does not implicate downstream harm avoidance.","RX.5":"Verifying citations centrally involves confirming the provenance and traceability of referenced ideas and works."}}

rationale.R1.7: The delegation directly requests checking the citations, which aligns with verifying reference accuracy, literature coverage, and proper attribution as the load-bearing task.
rationale.RX.1: The delegation does not involve identifying or disclosing uncertainties in the artifact.
rationale.RX.2: Checking citations can peripherally support avoiding overclaims by ensuring claims are properly supported and attributed.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation does not request ensuring adherence to the scope of the research or artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The delegation on citations in a numerical framework paper does not implicate downstream harm avoidance.
rationale.RX.5: Verifying citations centrally involves confirming the provenance and traceability of referenced ideas and works.
